name: Chappal Kebab- Hamburger Kebabs - India
recipeIngredient: 1 tbsp chickpea flour (also known as gram flour or besan)
1 1/2 lbs ground beef or lamb (ground very fine)
1/2 cup fresh cilantro leaves, chopped coarsely
2 fresh hot green chilies, cut into rounds with seeds removed
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small cast-iron frying pan, stir the chickpea flour over medium heat until it turns a light brown color.
2. Transfer the chickpea flour to a bowl.
3. Add all other ingredients except oil and mix well.
4. Form ten 2-inch balls from the mixture.
5. Shape the balls into 10 hamburger patties that are about 3 1/2 inches in diameter.
6. Heat 2 tablespoons of vegetable oil in a large nonstick frying pan over medium-high heat.
7. When the oil is hot, add as many kebabs as will fit in a single layer in the pan.
8. Turn the kebabs every 20 seconds or so and cook until they are browned on both sides, about 2 1/2 minutes total.
9. Remove the kebabs to a warm plate.
10. Use the remaining oil to cook the second batch of kebabs.
